name: Domo
description: Monitor Domo business intelligence platform for user access and data governance compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Domo at https://developer.domo.com
2. Go to New Client → create a client with User Read scope
3. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret
4. Enter both below

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Domo Developer Portal → New Client

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Domo Developer Portal → New Client
